About

Builder.
World-maker.

I'm Tanishk Vashistha, a passionate Minecraft builder known in the community as Tanvik_. I specialise in turning ideas into living, breathing worlds — one block at a time.

My work spans grand architectural structures, detailed organic sculptures like animals and figures, and sweeping terrain landscapes that feel like real places you can get lost in.

With 70+ builds completed across both Java and Bedrock editions, I can bring your vision to life on whichever platform you play on.

Contact

Let's build something epic.

Whether you need a spawn, a custom map, an organic sculpture, or a sweeping terrain — I'm available for commissions on both Java and Bedrock editions. Reach out and let's talk about your project.
